evals.name: quarterly-review-q1
evals.prompt: help me query 2026 Q1 jira tasks that is assigned by me and use SMART principle to evaluate each task value. Yes the dates 2026-01-01 to 2026-03-31 are correct, go ahead.
evals.expected_output: A structured report with SMART scoring table, per-task FACT/ASSUME breakdown, and constructed OKRs grouped by theme
expectations: Report contains a SMART summary table with columns for S, M, A, R, T scores using symbols
Each task has a FACT block with observable Jira data
Each task has an ASSUME block with interpretive analysis
Each task has a SUGGEST block with specific improvement recommendations
Report contains constructed OKRs grouped by theme with Objectives and Key Results
Each Key Result references specific ticket keys as evidence
Report includes OKR Quality Assessment with FACT/ASSUME per objective group
Report ends with actionable recommendations for task quality and OKR strength
The Jira query used correct date range and assignee filter
Each task includes a Theme label for OKR grouping

evals.name: casual-score-request
evals.prompt: how well-defined are my CR tickets from last month? score them and help me build OKRs. Yes the date range is correct.
evals.expected_output: SMART evaluation of tasks from the previous month with OKR construction, despite casual phrasing
expectations: Report contains a SMART summary table with S, M, A, R, T scores
Each task has FACT, ASSUME, and SUGGEST blocks
The date range was correctly interpreted as February 2026
Report contains constructed OKRs with Objectives and Key Results
Each Key Result references specific ticket keys as evidence
Report includes a SMART Health Summary with average score and strongest/weakest dimensions
Report includes recommendations section
Casual phrasing did not degrade output structure or completeness

evals.name: explicit-okr-build
evals.prompt: I need to prepare my quarterly OKR report. Pull my CR tasks from Q4 2025 (Oct-Dec), SMART-score each one, then construct OKRs from them grouped by theme. The dates 2025-10-01 to 2025-12-31 are confirmed.
evals.expected_output: Full SMART evaluation + OKR construction with clear theme grouping and quality assessment per OKR
expectations: Report contains a SMART summary table with S, M, A, R, T scores
Each task has FACT, ASSUME, and SUGGEST blocks
The Jira query used date range 2025-10-01 to 2025-12-31
Report contains OKRs explicitly grouped by theme
Each Objective is written as an outcome, not an activity
Each Key Result is quantifiable and references ticket keys
Report includes OKR Quality Assessment per theme group
Report includes both Task Quality and OKR Strength recommendations
Tasks are grouped into at least 1 theme
Report includes total tasks count, total SP, and average SMART score
